title: Duplication of WP core packages
summary: Plugins should not bundle scripts or libraries that are already packaged natively into WordPress Core.

guidance.why_it_matters: Providing your own copy of jQuery or PHPmailer conflicts with WordPress Core versions, leading to massive caching, performance, and security vulnerabilities.
guidance.fix: Delete the included library and use wp_enqueue_script('jquery') or other WP-native loading methods.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Low. Unless they are inside a .wpignore directory like vendor or node_modules.
